Phase1.Title: Opening (Fase Inicial)
Phase1.Description: Base behavior and single target shadow bolt attacks.

Phase2.Title: Escalation (Invocação Sombria)
Phase2.Description: Unlocks new abilities. Summons 2 Shadow Servants to shield the boss.

Phase3.Title: Dangerous (Controle e Terremoto Sombrio)
Phase3.Description: Severe mechanics activate. Begins casting telegraphed AoE Shadow Earthquake.

Phase4.Title: Final / Enrage (Fúria Absoluta)
Phase4.Description: Maximum aggression. Gains 5x damage, higher attack speed, and ignores crowd control.

Phase1.Title: Opening (Despertar do Fogo)
Phase1.Description: Standard fire swipes and basic flame breath attacks.

Phase2.Title: Escalation (Cólera dos Servos)
Phase2.Description: Unlocks volcanic pools and summons Fire Drakes as reinforcement.

Phase3.Title: Dangerous (Chuva de Meteoros)
Phase3.Description: Channeling fire telegraph arrays that cover the arena.

Phase4.Title: Final / Draconic Rage (Fúria do Dragão do Vazio)
Phase4.Description: A dragon never retreats once true combat has begun. Enters Draconic Rage, gaining massive spell intensity and attack speed. Resolved as player dies or dragon dies.
